name: Fortella - SDR Agent
description: Researches prospects and drafts outreach sequences for human approval

parameters.query: Account.Domain = '{{ $json.domain }}' AND (Title LIKE '%VP%' OR Title LIKE '%Director%' OR Title LIKE '%Head%')

parameters.prompt: Draft personalized cold email to {{ $json.contactName }}, {{ $json.contactTitle }} at {{ $json.company }}. Reference: {{ $json.companyDescription }}. Pain point: {{ $json.painPoint }}. Keep under 100 words, compelling, ask for 15-min call.
Draft follow-up email (3 days later) to {{ $json.contactName }} at {{ $json.company }}. Reference previous email about {{ $json.painPoint }}. Shorter, mention value prop briefly.
Draft breakup email (7 days later) to {{ $json.contactName }} at {{ $json.company }}. Short, polite, mention this is last reach-out, offer value (resource/guide) regardless.
